task_completion.description: Verify that a sphere primitive is present in the CoppeliaSim scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a sphere object in the CoppeliaSim 3D viewport or listed in the scene hierarchy panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that a 100-point toolpath is visualized using dummy objects in a grid pattern over the sphere.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dense grid (approximately 10x10) of dummy objects (coordinate frames) hovering above the top surface of the sphere in the CoppeliaSim 3D viewport.

task_completion.description: Verify that the dummy objects maintain a standoff distance and their +Z axes point toward the sphere center.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look closely at the dummy coordinate frames in the 3D viewport. There should be a visible gap between the dummies and the sphere surface, and the Z-axis (typically the blue line) of each dummy should point inward directly at the center of the sphere.

task_completion.description: Verify that the toolpath.csv file is created with the correct columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal window, file manager, or text editor showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/toolpath.csv'. It must include headers: waypoint_id, surface_x, surface_y, surface_z, tool_x, tool_y, tool_z, tool_qx, tool_qy, tool_qz, tool_qw, followed by data rows.

task_completion.description: Verify that the toolpath_report.json file is created with the correct fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal window or text editor showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/toolpath_report.json'. It must include fields: total_waypoints, sphere_center_x, sphere_center_y, sphere_center_z, sphere_radius_m, and standoff_distance_m.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used a script to generate the toolpath and dummies programmatically.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a Python script (e.g., using the ZMQ Remote API) in a text editor or terminal being executed. The agent should not be manually placing 100 dummy objects one by one via the CoppeliaSim GUI.

integrity.description: Ensure the CSV and JSON files were generated by the script.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Python script should contain code to write the CSV and JSON files. The agent should not manually type out the 100-row CSV or the JSON file.

integrity.description: Ensure CoppeliaSim was actually used to visualize the scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CoppeliaSim application window should be visible in the screenshots with the generated objects, proving the agent interacted with the simulator and didn't just mock the file outputs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected sphere center: [0.5, 0.0, 0.1]. Expected radius: 0.25m. Expected standoff distance: 0.05m (50mm). Minimum waypoints: 100. Output CSV path: /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/toolpath.csv. Output JSON path: /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/toolpath_report.json.
